entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00110) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION ESTABLISHES THE PER-HULL PRICE FOR AN ORDER QUANTITY OF TWO (2) BOATS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00111) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION EXTENDS THE CONTRACT PRICE PERIOD 10 ORDERING PERIOD BY ONE MONTH FOR THE PERIOD 21 DECEMBER 2016 THROUGH 20 JANUARY 2017.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION EXTENDS THE CONTRACT PRICE PERIOD 10 ORDERING PERIOD BY ONE MONTH FOR THE PERIOD 21 JANUARY 2017 THROUGH 20 FEBRUARY 2017.

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00113) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION REVISES THE TITLE OF CLIN 10007B FROM FY15 OE FUNDED ORDERS PLACED 21SEP2015 20FEB2017 TO FMS FUNDED ORDERS PLACED 21SEP2015 20FEB2017 AND ADDED RATES TO BE NEGOTIATED PER ORDER. THE CEILING PRICE FOR CLIN 10007A IS REDUCED BY $910,000 FROM $3,000,000 TO $2,090,000 AND THE CEILING PRICE FOR CLIN 10007B IS RAISED BY $910,000 FROM $90,000 TO $1,000,000.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00114) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION EXTENDS THE CONTRACT PRICE PERIOD 10 ORDERING PERIOD BY ONE MONTH FOR THE PERIOD OF 21 FEBRUARY 2017 THROUGH 20 MARCH 2017. AUTHORIZATION FOR EXTENSION WAS PROVIDED BY HEAD OF THE CONTRACTING ACTIVITY (HCA) APPROVAL DATED 17 JUNE 2016.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00119) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION CORRECTS TWO INADVERTENT ERRORS OF ITEMS PREVIOUSLY NEGOTIATED AND AGREED UPON. 1) SOW 041-1.1 CORRECTS DATES 2) SOW 087-3 CORRECTS NUMBER OF MONTHS OF CONTRACTING PRO LOCATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
